audit_status.source_base: Greek Gospel text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for sign demand, yeast of Pharisees/Sadducees, Peter confession, rock/keys/binding-loosing, first passion prediction, Satan/adversary rebuke, cross-following, psyche life/soul, Son of Humanity coming.

verses.restored: Pharisees and Sadducees came, testing him, and asked him to show them a sign from heaven.
He answered them, When evening comes you say, Fair weather, for the sky is red.
And in the morning, Storm today, for the sky is red and gloomy. You know how to discern the face of the sky, but not the signs of the times.
A harmful and adulterous generation seeks a sign, and no sign will be given except the sign of Jonah. Leaving them, he went away.
The disciples came to the other side and had forgotten to take bread.
Jesus said to them, Watch and beware of the leaven of the Pharisees and Sadducees.
They reasoned among themselves, saying, It is because we took no bread.
Knowing this, Jesus said, Ones of little trust, why do you reason among yourselves that you have no bread?
Do you not yet understand or remember the five loaves for the five thousand, and how many baskets you took up?
Nor the seven loaves for the four thousand, and how many baskets you took up?
How do you not understand that I did not speak to you about bread, but to beware of the leaven of the Pharisees and Sadducees?
Then they understood that he did not say to beware of bread-leaven, but of the teaching of the Pharisees and Sadducees.
Coming into the region of Caesarea Philippi, Jesus asked his disciples, Who do people say the Son of Humanity is?
They said, Some say John the Baptist, others Elijah, others Jeremiah or one of the prophets.
He said to them, But you, who do you say I am?
Simon Peter answered, You are the Messiah, the Son of the living Divine.
Jesus answered him, Blessed/flourishing are you, Simon Bar-Jonah, because flesh and blood did not reveal this to you, but my Father in the heavens.
And I also say to you that you are Peter/Rock, and on this rock I will build my assembly, and the gates of Hades will not overpower it.
I will give you the keys of the reign of the heavens; whatever you bind on earth will have been bound in the heavens, and whatever you loose on earth will have been loosed in the heavens.
Then he ordered the disciples to tell no one that he was the Messiah.
From then Jesus began to show his disciples that he must go to Jerusalem, suffer many things from elders, chief priests, and scribes, be killed, and on the third day be raised.
Peter took him aside and began to rebuke him, saying, Mercy to you, Lord; this shall never happen to you.
But turning, he said to Peter, Go behind me, adversary; you are a stumbling-block to me, because you are not thinking the things of the Divine, but the things of humans.
Then Jesus said to his disciples, If anyone wants to come after me, let that one deny self, take up the cross, and follow me.
For whoever wants to save his life/soul will lose it, but whoever loses his life/soul because of me will find it.
For what will a person be profited if gaining the whole world but forfeiting his life/soul? Or what will a person give in exchange for his life/soul?
For the Son of Humanity is about to come in the glory of his Father with his messengers, and then he will give back to each according to practice.
Amen, I say to you: there are some standing here who will certainly not taste death until they see the Son of Humanity coming in his reign.
